title: Backorder Processing - Sales Order Management
description: Automated test for processing backorders in JD Edwards E1 Sales Order Management module
acceptanceCriteria: Given a user is logged into JDE E1, When they navigate to Backorder Release, Then the backorder inquiry form should be displayed
Given backorders exist in the system, When user searches by customer number, Then backorder lines should be displayed
Given backorder lines are displayed, When user selects items and releases them, Then status should change to Released
Given backorder is released, When inventory is checked, Then allocation should be updated for the items
